items.title: Jim Cramer on Home Depot: “I Would Buy More”
items.description: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared his take on. Noting that the stock is down despite Fed rate cuts, a caller inquired if they should add to their position, sell, or hold. Cramer stated: “Yes, I would buy more. It’s a big position for my Charitable Trust. Why […]
